sections.short-biography: Leader of the van, he was killed in the first encounter by Deng Ai.
sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi: When Guanqiu Jian rose in revolt against Sima Shi, Ge Yong was made Leader of the Van, warning that “Nandun is an excellent site for a camp, with a river beside it and hills at the rear. If the Wei armies camp there, we shall be unable to dislodge them. Let us occupy it.” but it was too late, the Wei forces had already arrived. When Shoucchn fell to Sima Shi’s armies, Guanqiu Jian tried his luck, sending out Ge Yong to duel Deng Ai but Ge Yong was killed in the first encounter.

full_text:
Ge Yong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ge Yong. Leader of the van, he was killed in the first encounter by Deng Ai. Ge Yong was affiliated with Guanqiu Jian.

Short Biography
Leader of the van, he was killed in the first encounter by Deng Ai.
Details
Wade-GilesKo Yung
Literary Appearances
Romance of the Three Kingdoms:110
BiographySanguo Yanyi
When Guanqiu Jian rose in revolt against Sima Shi, Ge Yong was made Leader of the Van, warning that “Nandun is an excellent site for a camp, with a river beside it and hills at the rear. If the Wei armies camp there, we shall be unable to dislodge them. Let us occupy it.” but it was too late, the Wei forces had already arrived. When Shoucchn fell to Sima Shi’s armies, Guanqiu Jian tried his luck, sending out Ge Yong to duel Deng Ai but Ge Yong was killed in the first encounter.
